title: Run scoped await no-candidates guidance
goal: Improve reactive await_members feedback for operation-scoped runs with only terminal/stale workers.
completionConditions: await_members owned_only + run_id empty snapshot uses run-specific guidance instead of generic scoped default text.
Guidance mentions run_id and actionable list/health/cleanup/retry next steps.
Existing generic owned_only behavior without run_id remains unchanged.
Focused tests, cargo check, selfdev build/reload, governance, commit and push pass.
notes: Continuation of operation_id run-scoped follow-up work. Small UX/recovery improvement, no protocol changes.
